sourceProfiles.squareCheck: Every covered endpoint selected by each profiled full menu is exactly squarefree-certified.

inheritedBoundaryAudit.observedReasonForInheritedWindow: The inherited cap is the predecessor nextSubatom.seedEscapeWindow carried into the selector lane.
notFoundInThisAudit: A theorem packet proving that 25000 is a collision-free matching invariant.
A theorem packet proving that endpoints with 25000 < |delta| <= 28500 are illegal.
A theorem packet showing that the p67 endpoint at left=34414907 breaks right-compatibility or squarefreeness.

selectorLayerDecision.statement: At endpoint-selector scope, window 28500 is the first profiled exact-factor window that repairs the inherited 25000-window miss without violating side, outsider-compatibility, or cross-squarefree checks.
selectorLayerDecision.boundary: This decision is endpoint-selector legality only. Collision-free matching and all-N squarefree hitting remain downstream theorem obligations.

alreadySatisfiedAtEndpointLayer: The p67 endpoint is inside the candidate 28500 window.
The p67 endpoint has right == 18 mod 25.
The p67 endpoint satisfies outsider compatibility by construction.
The p67 endpoint has exact squarefree cross product status exact_squarefree.
The broad exact-factor grid covers 1095/1095 rows at window 28500.
notProvedHere: All-N coverage for every q17 residual row.
A symbolic residue-class squarefree-hitting lemma for the full endpoint menu.

theoremFork.statement: Decide whether the q17 residual selector may use the candidate 28500 endpoint window.
theoremFork.completionRule: Endpoint-selector legality is supported; route the remaining work to availability strata and matching handoff.

theoremFork.statement: If 25000 is a real matching invariant, keep the cap and route left=34414907 into a replacement/augmenting-path handoff instead of direct selector relaxation.
theoremFork.completionRule: A bounded replacement path becomes a symbolic augmentation lemma, or emits the next deterministic obstruction.

theoremFork.statement: Convert the p67 and fallback endpoint availability thresholds into residue-class strata so the loop stops extending by one row at a time.
theoremFork.completionRule: Every residual class is assigned to an endpoint prime/window stratum or the first unassigned residue class is emitted.
